cards.name: V — StreetKid
cards.rulesText:
{Call} Trash 3. Then, add 1 BRAINDANCE Program from your trash to your hand.
{Go Solo} (Pay this Legend's cost to play it as a ready Unit. It can attack this turn. If it leaves the field, remove it from the game.)

cards.name: Royce — Psycho on the Edge
cards.rulesText:
{Go Solo} (Pay this Legend's cost to play it as a ready Unit. It can attack this turn. If it leaves the field, remove it from the game.)
During your turn, this Legend has +2 power for each of its equipped Gear.

cards.name: Adam Smasher — Ender of Legends
cards.rulesText:
{Go Solo} (Pay this Legend's cost to play it as a ready Unit. It can attack this turn. If it leaves the field, remove it from the game.)
{Play} Defeat a rival Unit.

cards.name: Yorinobu Arasaka — Embracing Destruction
cards.rulesText: The first time a friendly ARASAKA Unit attacks each turn, draw 1. Then, if you have less than 20 ☆ (Street Cred), discard 1.

cards.name: Japantown Jonin
cards.rulesText:
{Play} Give a friendly Unit +2 power this turn.
(Units with power 0 don't steal Gigs.)

cards.name: La Llorona — Ghost of the Past
cards.displayName: La Llorona — Ghost of the Past
cards.rulesText:
{Blocker} (You may spend this Unit to redirect a rival Unit's attack to it instead.)
When this Unit uses {Blocker}, increase a Gig by up to 3.

cards.name: Swordwise Huscle
cards.rulesText: {Attack} If this Unit has power 5+, draw 1.

cards.name: 6th Street Recruits
cards.rulesText: When a friendly Unit steals a d6, increase a Gig by up to 6.

cards.name: Kerry Eurodyne — The Last Rockerboy
cards.rulesText: {Spend} If you control a Gig with 8+ value, draw 2.

cards.name: Meredith Stout — Stone Cold Corpo
El Sombrerón — La Venganza Lenta
cards.rulesText: {Attack} You may pay 2 €$. If you do, this Unit gains power equal to a friendly max Gig this turn.

cards.name: Royce — Don't Call Me Simon
cards.rulesText: {Play} Defeat a rival Unit with power 2 or less. If you have more ☆ (Street Cred) than a Rival, defeat a rival Unit with power 3 or less instead.

cards.name: Screw — Lovelorn Fool
cards.rulesText: {Defeated} Add another Unit from your trash to your hand.

cards.name: Minotaur
cards.rulesText: {Play} If you have more ☆ (Street Cred) than a Rival, defeat a rival Unit with power 5 or less.

cards.name: Octant
cards.rulesText: Play this Unit for -1 €$ for each friendly Gig with 8+ value, to a minimum of 1 €$.

cards.name: Yorinobu Arasaka — Steel Dragon
cards.rulesText:
{Play} You may play a Unit with cost 4 or less from your hand or trash for free. It can attack rival Units this turn.
The first time an ARASAKA Unit is defeated each turn, draw 1.

cards.name: Mantis Blades
cards.rulesText:
(Equip to a friendly Unit or face-up Legend.)
"One cut, one kill."

cards.name: Satori — Sword of Saburo
cards.rulesText:
(Equip to a friendly Unit or face-up Legend.)
When this Unit wins a fight against a rival Unit, draw 1.

cards.name: All is Lost
cards.rulesText: Trash 3. Add a Unit from among them to your hand.

cards.name: Industrial Assembly
cards.rulesText: Increase a Gig by up to 4. If you control a Gig with 8+ value, draw 1.

cards.name: Appetite for Destruction
cards.rulesText: The next time a friendly Unit wins a fight by 3+ power this turn, it also steals a Gig.

cards.name: Over the Edge
cards.rulesText: Defeat a Unit with power equal to or less than the value of a friendly d20.

cards.name: Carnage at the Colosseum
cards.rulesText:
Play this Program for -1 €$ for each friendly Gig with 8+ value, to a minimum of 1 €$.
Defeat a rival Unit with less power than a friendly Unit.

cards.name: Dum Dum — Maelstrom Triggerman
cards.rulesText:
{Call} You may defeat a friendly Gear. If you do, draw 2. Otherwise, draw 1.
{Quick} 1 €$, {Spend} Give a friendly Unit +1 power this turn for each of its equipped Gear.

cards.name: Kerry Eurodyne — Axe, Attitude, Audience
cards.rulesText:
When you roll in a Gig from your fixer area, you may ignore the result and reroll it once.
When you roll a min or max value on a Gig, draw 1. If it's a d20, draw 3 instead.

cards.name: River Ward — Detective on the Hunt
cards.displayName: River Ward — Detective on the Hunt
cards.rulesText:
{Quick} {Spend} Play a Gear with cost 2 or less from your hand for free.
When a friendly equipped Unit is defeated, search the top 2 cards of your deck and trash 1.

cards.name: Viktor Vektor — Sit Down and Relax
cards.displayName: Viktor Vektor — Sit Down and Relax
cards.rulesText: {Call} Search the top 5 cards of your deck. Reveal up to 2 Gears with cost 2 or less and add them to your hand. Bottom-deck the rest in a random order.

cards.name: Secondhand Bombus
cards.rulesText:
{Blocker} (You may spend this Unit to redirect a rival Unit's attack to it instead.)
(Units with power 0 don't steal Gigs.)

cards.name: Sketchy Ripper
cards.rulesText:
{Attack} Search the top 3 cards of your deck. Reveal a Gear and add it to your hand. Bottom-deck the rest.
(Units with power 0 don't steal Gigs.)

cards.name: Augmented Negotiators
cards.rulesText:
{Blocker} (You may spend this Unit to redirect a rival Unit's attack to it instead.)
When this Unit uses {Blocker}, a Rival discards 1.

cards.name: Dexter DeShawn — One Last Chance
cards.rulesText:
{Play} {Attack} Adjust a Gig by up to 1.
{Defeated} If your ☆ (Street Cred) differs from a Rival's by 10+, draw 2.

cards.name: Viktor Vektor — You Might Feel a Little Pinch
cards.displayName: Viktor Vektor — You Might Feel a Little Pinch
cards.rulesText: {Play} Play a CYBERWARE Gear with cost 2 or less from your trash for free. Equip it only to another friendly Unit.

cards.name: Gilded Matón
cards.rulesText: {Play} You may defeat a friendly Gear. If you do, defeat a rival Unit with cost 3 or less.

cards.name: Hanako Arasaka — In a Gilded Cage
cards.displayName: Hanako Arasaka — In a Gilded Cage
cards.rulesText: {Play} Search the top 4 cards of your deck. Reveal any number of cards with cost equal to any friendly Gig values and add them to your hand. Bottom-deck the rest.

cards.name: Offduty Malfini
cards.rulesText: {Play} Spend this Unit and a rival Unit.

cards.name: T-Bug — Amateur Philosopher
cards.rulesText: {Defeated} Look at all friendly face-down Legends. Then, you may Call a Legend for free. (You can only Call a Legend once per turn.)

cards.name: Caliber — Totentanz's Top Dog
cards.rulesText:
{Play} Defeat a rival Unit with cost 2 or less.
{Defeated} A Rival discards 1. If the card's cost equals the value of a friendly Gig, that Rival discards 1 more.

cards.name: Jackie Welles — Ride or Die Choom
cards.displayName: Jackie Welles — Ride or Die Choom
cards.rulesText:
{Attack} Give this Unit +2 power this turn for each friendly Gig with an even value.
{Defeated} Draw 1 for each friendly Gig with an odd value.

cards.name: Adam Smasher — Metal Over Meat
cards.rulesText: {Play} Defeat all other Units.

cards.name: Kiroshi Optics
cards.rulesText:
(Equip to a friendly Unit or face-up Legend.)
{Attack} Look at a friendly face-down Legend. (Don't reveal it.)

cards.name: Mandibular Upgrade
cards.rulesText:
(Equip to a friendly Unit or face-up Legend.)
{Blocker} (You may spend this Unit to redirect a rival Unit's attack to it instead.)

cards.name: Zetatech Faceplate
cards.rulesText:
(Equip to a friendly Unit or face-up Legend.)
When this Unit or Legend is spent, adjust a Gig by up to 1. Then, if you control 3 or more Gigs with different values, draw 1.

cards.name: Gorilla Arms
cards.rulesText:
(Equip to a friendly Unit or face-up Legend.)
The first time this Unit steals 1 or more Gigs each turn, steal a rival Gig with a value not shared by a friendly Gig.

cards.name: Afterparty at Lizzie's
cards.rulesText: Adjust a Gig by up to 1. If you control 2 or more Gigs with different values, draw 1.

cards.name: Cyberpsychosis
cards.rulesText: {Quick} Give an equipped Unit +3 power this turn for each if its equipped Gears. If that Unit steals or fights, defeat it at the end of this turn.

cards.name: Live with the Aftermath
cards.rulesText: Each player defeats one of their Units.

cards.name: Bootleg Black Sapphire Show
cards.rulesText:
Sell the top card of your deck.
If you control a Gig with an even value and a Gig with an odd value, draw 2.

cards.name: Goro Takemura — Hands Unclean
cards.rulesText:
{Go Solo} (Pay this Legend's cost to play it as a ready Unit. It can attack this turn. If it leaves the field, remove it from the game.)
{Blocker} (You may spend this Unit to redirect a rival Unit's attack to it instead.)

cards.name: Goro Takemura — Vengeful Bodyguard
cards.rulesText:
{Quick} 1 €$, {Spend} Give a friendly Unit with cost 4 or less {Blocker} this turn. If you control a value-pair of Gigs, also give it +1 power this turn.
When a friendly Unit uses {Blocker}, you may discard 1. If you do, draw 1.

cards.name: Hanako Arasaka — Daughter of the Emperor
cards.displayName: Hanako Arasaka — Daughter of the Emperor
cards.rulesText:
{Spend} Swap a friendly Gig with a rival Gig.
At the start of your turn, draw 1 for each friendly value-pair of Gigs.

cards.name: Panam Palmer — Nomad Cavalry
cards.rulesText:
2 €$, {Spend} Move a Gear from this Legend to an unequipped friendly Unit. If you do, ready that Unit.
At the end of your turn, if 5 or more friendly Units and/or Legends are equipped, ready them.

cards.name: Saburo Arasaka — Stubborn Patriarch
cards.rulesText:
Friendly ARASAKA Units have +1 power while attacking.
(Units steal an extra Gig for every 10 power.)

cards.name: Corpo Security
cards.rulesText:
This Unit can't attack.
{Blocker} (You may spend this Unit to redirect a rival Unit's attack to it instead.)

cards.name: Emergency Atlus
cards.rulesText: "Grab the policyholder, leave the rest for the city meatwagon."

cards.name: Field Operator
cards.rulesText: {Play} If your ☆ (Street Cred) is an even number, draw 1.

cards.name: Valentino Street Racer
cards.rulesText: {Play} Give another friendly Unit with cost 5 or less {Adrenaline} this turn. (A Unit with Adrenaline can attack the turn it's played.)

cards.name: Goro Takemura — Losing His Way
cards.rulesText: {Attack} If all friendly Legends are face-up, this Unit has +5 power this turn.

cards.name: Pepe Najarro — Working Doubles
cards.rulesText: {Attack} If you control a value-pair of Gigs, ready up to 2 MERC Legends in your Legends area.

cards.name: Riding Nomad
cards.rulesText: {Adrenaline} (This Unit can attack the turn it's played.)

cards.name: Wraith Marauders
cards.rulesText: When this Unit steals a Gig, ready another friendly Unit with power equal to the Gig's value.

cards.name: Nadia — Fighting Through Grief
cards.rulesText: If a Rival controls more Gigs than you, this Unit can attack their Gig area the turn it's played.

cards.name: Sandayu Oda — Hanako's Guardian
cards.rulesText:
{Play} Spend a rival Unit for each friendly value-pair of Gigs.
This Unit can attack rival Units the turn it's played.

cards.name: Saul Bright — Stormrider
cards.rulesText:
Other friendly Units have +2 power while attacking.
At the end of your turn, ready up to 3 friendly Units.

cards.name: Sandevistan
cards.rulesText:
(Equip to a friendly Unit or face-up Legend.)
At the end of your turn, ready this Unit or Legend.

cards.name: Overwatch — Panam's Gift
cards.rulesText: {Quick} 1 €$, {Spend} Discard 1. Defeat a spent rival Unit with cost equal to or less than the discarded card's cost.

cards.name: Peace Offering
cards.rulesText: You may set a Gig's value to the value of another Gig. Then, if you control a value-pair, draw 1.

cards.name: Corporate Surveillance
cards.rulesText: Spend a rival Unit with cost 4 or less.

cards.name: Fool on the Hill
cards.rulesText: Reveal the top 2 cards of your deck. A Rival chooses whether you add them to your hand or trash them. If you trash them, draw 2.

cards.name: Take Control
cards.rulesText: {Quick} A rival Unit steals 1 fewer Gig this turn. If that Unit is an AI, DRONE, or VEHICLE, draw 1.

cards.name: Sasha Yakovleva — Won't Let You Down
cards.displayName: Sasha Yakovleva — Won't Let You Down

cards.name: V — Corporate Exile
cards.rulesText: {Go Solo} (Pay this Legend's cost to play it as a ready Unit. It can attack this turn. If it leaves the field, remove it from the game.)

cards.name: Alt Cunningham — Soulkiller Architect
cards.rulesText:
{Spend} Your next Program this turn plays for -1 €$ for each friendly min Gig, to a minimum of 1 €$.
1 €$, {Spend} Play a Program from your trash. Bottom-deck it after you play it. (You still pay its cost.)

cards.name: Evelyn Parker — Beautiful Enigma
cards.rulesText:
When a friendly CORPO or GANGER Unit steals 1 or more Gigs, ready 1 Eddie.
1 €$, {Spend} A rival Unit must attack next turn if it can.

cards.name: Jackie Welles — Pour One Out For Me
cards.displayName: Jackie Welles — Pour One Out For Me
cards.rulesText: The first time you play a Blue Unit or Blue Gear each turn, you may decrease a friendly Gig by up to 2. If it becomes a min Gig, draw 1.

cards.name: Evelyn Parker — Scheming Siren
cards.rulesText:
{Attack} Draw 1. Then, if you have more ☆ (Street Cred) than a Rival, discard 1.
(Units with power 0 don't steal Gigs.)

cards.name: Jacked-In Voodoo Boy
cards.rulesText: This Unit can't attack unless you played a Program this turn.

cards.name: Misty Olszewski — Mender of Broken Spirits
cards.displayName: Misty Olszewski — Mender of Broken Spirits
cards.rulesText:
This Unit can't attack.
At the end of your turn, choose a card type. Then, reveal the top card of your deck. If it's the chosen type, add it to your hand and ready 1 Eddie. Otherwise, trash it.
(Card types include Unit, Gear, and Program.)

cards.name: Mox Inciters
cards.rulesText:
{Play} A rival Unit must attack next turn if it can.
{Blocker} (You may spend this Unit to redirect a rival Unit's attack to it instead.)

cards.name: Delamain Cab
cards.rulesText: At the end of your turn, if this Unit stole a Gig this turn, ready 1 Eddie.

cards.name: Psycho Squad
cards.rulesText: [Flavor] Their protocol stops at “shoot first.”

cards.name: Rita Wheeler — No Stupid Questions
cards.rulesText:
{Blocker} (You may spend this Unit to redirect a rival Unit's attack to it instead.)
The first time this Unit is spent each turn, draw 1, then discard 1.

cards.name: Lizzy Wizzy — Delicate Weapon
cards.rulesText:
{Play} You may play a Program with cost 3 or less from your hand or trash for free. Bottom-deck it after you play it.
{Blocker}

cards.name: Maman Brigitte — Spirit of Death
cards.rulesText: {Play} You may discard 2 Programs. If you do, bottom-deck a rival unequipped Unit.

cards.name: MT0D12 Flathead
cards.rulesText: If you have less ☆ (Street Cred) than a Rival, this Unit can't be blocked.

cards.name: Modded Kusanagi
cards.rulesText:
{Adrenaline} (This Unit can attack the turn it's played.)
At the end of your turn, return this Unit to its owner's hand.

cards.name: Placide — Voodoo Sentinel
cards.rulesText: {Play} {Attack} You may discard 1 Program. If you do, bottom-deck a rival Unit.

cards.name: Dying Night — V's Pistol
cards.rulesText:
(Equip to a friendly Unit or face-up Legend.)
{Attack} Decrease a Gig by up to 2. At the end of your turn, if this Unit is named "V", ready 2 Eddies.

cards.name: Floor It
cards.rulesText: {Quick} Give a rival Unit -1 power this turn. Draw 1.

cards.name: Reboot Optics
cards.rulesText: {Quick} The next time a rival Unit fights this turn, it doesn't defeat the opposing friendly Unit.

cards.name: Chrome Reverie
cards.rulesText: A rival Unit can't attack until your next turn. If you control a min Gig, you may Call a Legend for free. (You can only Call a Legend once per turn.)
